scripts.dev:desktop: concurrently -k -n server,client,electron -c blue,green,cyan "pnpm --filter @myeditor/server dev" "pnpm --filter @myeditor/client dev" "sleep 3 && pnpm --filter @myeditor/desktop dev"
scripts.dev:tauri: concurrently -k -n go,client,tauri -c blue,green,cyan "pnpm build:go-dev" "pnpm --filter @myeditor/client dev" "sleep 4 && pnpm tauri:dev"
scripts.build: pnpm --filter @myeditor/shared build && pnpm --filter @myeditor/server build && pnpm --filter @myeditor/client build && pnpm --filter @myeditor/desktop build
scripts.build:go-dev: cd packages/server-go && /opt/homebrew/bin/go build -o myeditor-server . && PROJECT_PATH=${PROJECT_PATH:-.} PORT=3000 ./myeditor-server
scripts.build:tauri: pnpm --filter @myeditor/shared build && pnpm build:go && pnpm --filter @myeditor/client build && pnpm tauri:build
scripts.tauri:dev: cd packages/desktop-tauri && source $HOME/.cargo/env && cargo tauri dev
scripts.tauri:build: cd packages/desktop-tauri && source $HOME/.cargo/env && cargo tauri build
